extracted_at.description: When insights were extracted (ISO format or null)

summary.description: One-sentence summary of the email's purpose/content

test_cases.user_prompt:
Extract insights from this email:

Subject: Unlimited Diagrams, AI Driven Tools, Stronger Privacy
From: team@mermaidchart.com
Body:
Mermaid Pro/Enterprise offers a large set of features designed to reduce your workload and simplify complex diagramming tasks. With Pro, you'll get:

Unlimited Mermaid AI Assistance - Build as many visuals or ask as many questions as you'd like with unlimited Mermaid AI credits.
Unlimited Personal and Organization Diagram Files - Create, store and manage your diagrams all in one place.
Unlimited AI Diagram Repair - Instantly troubleshoot and polish your diagrams with AI Diagram repair.
Enhanced Data Confidentiality - Pro and Enterprise user diagram data will never be used to train our models.

Enterprise users also get:
Single Sign On - Keep your data within your Org space with SSO and prevent documentation loss.
Dedicated Customer Success Manager - Get tailored Mermaid support from one of our CSM's for you and your team!

Try Mermaid Pro/Enterprise today and get one week completely free!
Start My 7-Day Free Trial

548 Market St PMB 75432 San Francisco, CA, 94104

test_cases.description: Pictory AI video creation promotional email
test_cases.user_prompt:
Extract insights from this email:

Subject: We'll create your script + video FOR YOU!
From: kate@pictory.ai
Body:
Hi Yirang, not sure how to start your first video? No problem!

Share your idea and we'll write the script and generate your video, automatically!

Need an idea? How about "Create a...
* ...marketing video for [my product]"
* ...introduction about [my business]"
* ...tutorial on [my expertise]"
* ...communication for [my employees] about [topic]"

Remember, you're almost halfway through your 14-day free trial. Don't miss your chance to create your own AI video!

Kate P.
Your Customer Success Leader | pictory.ai

OVER 10 MILLION VIDEOS CREATED!

Pictory Corp, 22722 29th Dr SE West, Suite 100, Bothell, WA 98021

Extract insights from this email:

Subject: [HEAL-Engineering/heal-api] feat: add persona generation endpoint (#142)
From: notifications@github.com
Body:
yiranglim requested your review on pull request #142

heal-api/feat/persona-generation

## Summary
Adds the new `/api/v1/users/{user_id}/persona` endpoint for generating wellness personas from email insights and health data.

### Changes
- Added `PersonaService` with OpenAI integration for persona aggregation
- New Pydantic models for `PersonaResponse` and `WellnessCategoryData`
- PostgreSQL migrations for `user_personas` table
- Rate limiting: 1 generation per user per 24 hours
- Unit tests covering all 8 wellness categories

### Files changed (12)
backend/app/service/persona_service.py (+284, -0)
backend/app/model/schema/persona.py (+97, -0)
backend/app/api/v1/persona.py (+45, -0)
backend/migrations/versions/032_add_user_personas.py (+38, -0)
... and 8 more files

@mckaysnell please review when you get a chance, targeting merge by EOD Friday.

Reply to this email directly or view it on GitHub:
https://github.com/HEAL-Engineering/heal-api/pull/142

test_cases.description: Slack daily digest with unread messages
test_cases.user_prompt:
Extract insights from this email:

Subject: Here's what you missed in Heal Engineering
From: notification@slack.com
Body:
Heal Engineering workspace

You have 14 unread messages in 4 channels

#engineering (6 new)
- yirang: Deployed persona service to staging, running integration tests now
- mckay: Nice! I'll review the PR after standup
- jake: FYI the Aurora reader endpoint latency spiked to 230ms during the deploy
- yirang: Looking into it, might be connection pool exhaustion

#product (3 new)
- sarah: Updated the Q2 roadmap in Linear - persona insights moved to P0
- daniel: Can we get a demo of the persona feature for the investor deck?

#random (5 new)
- jake: Anyone want to do a team lunch at Red Iguana on Friday?
- sarah: Yes! Love that place
- yirang: I'm in
- mckay: Count me in, their mole is incredible
- jake: Booked for 12:30, table for 6

Catch up at healengineering.slack.com

Slack Technologies, LLC
500 Howard Street, San Francisco, CA 94105
